NowPlayingItem.OriginalTitle: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery
NowPlayingItem.Path: /mnt/exos22/Movies/Wake Up Dead Man - A Knives Out Mystery (2025)/Wake Up Dead Man - A Knives Out Mystery (2025) WEBDL-2160p.mkv
NowPlayingItem.Overview: When young priest Jud Duplenticy is sent to assist charismatic firebrand Monsignor Jefferson Wicks, it’s clear that all is not well in the pews. After a sudden and seemingly impossible murder rocks the town, the lack of an obvious suspect prompts local police chief Geraldine Scott to join forces with renowned detective Benoit Blanc to unravel a mystery that defies all logic.
